values.value: == CUSTOM SETTING XML FORMAT == File path: objects/SettingName__c.object metadataType: CustomObject memberName: SettingName__c <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObject xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <customSettingsType>Hierarchy</customSettingsType> <description>Optional description</description> <enableFeeds>false</enableFeeds> <label>Setting Label</label> <fields> <fullName>FieldName__c</fullName> <label>Field Label</label> <type>Text</type> <length>255</length> <required>false</required> </fields> </CustomObject> RULES: - customSettingsType is Hierarchy (default) or List - description is optional — omit entirely if not provided - enableFeeds is always false - DO NOT include <customSettingsVisibility> — not valid in API v61.0 - DO NOT include <sharingModel>, <nameField>, <pluralLabel>, <deploymentStatus> — these are NOT valid in Custom Setting XML - Supported field types: Checkbox, Currency, Date, DateTime, Email, Number, Percent, Phone, Text, TextArea, Url - DO NOT use LongTextArea, Picklist, Lookup or MasterDetail in Custom Settings - Checkbox fields: use <defaultValue>false</defaultValue> instead of <required> - Text fields: always include <length>255</length> - Number/Currency/Percent fields: include <precision>18</precision> and <scale>0</scale> - Multiple fields = ONE object file with multiple <fields> blocks - Element order inside <fields>: fullName, then type-specific elements, then label, then required/defaultValue, then type - For ADDING fields to existing setting: include ALL existing fields from org state plus the new one - For DELETING a field: use destructiveFiles with type CustomField, member = SettingName__c.FieldName__c - For DELETING the entire setting: use destructiveFiles with type CustomObject, member = SettingName__c
Custom Setting XML format and field type rules
